# Ballentine Storage

> Secure, affordable self storage units in Irmo, SC. Climate-controlled units, drive-up access, and 24/7 security.

Ballentine Storage is a self-storage facility located at 1005 State Rd S-40-286, Irmo, SC 29063. We serve Irmo, Lexington County, Richland County, White Rock, and Seven Oaks. Month-to-month leases with no long-term commitment.

## Services

- [Self Storage Facility](https://ballentinestorage.com/services/self-storage-facility)
- [Storage Facility](https://ballentinestorage.com/services/storage-facility)
- [Business Storage](https://ballentinestorage.com/services/business-storage)
- [Climate Controlled Storage](https://ballentinestorage.com/services/climate-controlled-storage)

## Areas We Serve

- [Irmo, SC](https://ballentinestorage.com/cities/irmo-south-carolina)
- [Lexington County, SC](https://ballentinestorage.com/cities/lexington-county-south-carolina)
- [Richland County, SC](https://ballentinestorage.com/cities/richland-county-south-carolina)
- [White Rock, SC](https://ballentinestorage.com/cities/white-rock-south-carolina)
- [Seven Oaks, SC](https://ballentinestorage.com/cities/seven-oaks-south-carolina)
